subcodes.first_line: This is a Tablet from this servant who glorieth in his servitude unto God, Who created him by His command and awakened him [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: هذا لوح من هذا العبد الذی یفتخر بعبودیته لله الذی خلقه بامر من عنده و ایقظه
subcodes.subjects: @spiritual transformation, @wine as symbol of spiritual transformation, @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @human soul as mirror; divine light, attributes within, @detachment; severance; renunciation; patience, @transcendence; unknowability of God, @power; greatness; centrality of the Covenant, @nearness and remoteness
